Stator Winding.Probable_Cause: Winding insulation degradation from repeated overheating or moisture contamination
Stator Winding.Recommended_Action: Perform insulation resistance test (megger) and check the cooling system

Bearing Wear.Probable_Cause: Inadequate lubrication, contamination, or bearing wear from excessive load
Bearing Wear.Recommended_Action: Re-lubricate or replace the bearing, check seal condition and shaft alignment

Rotor Bar.Probable_Cause: Broken/cracked rotor bar due to repeated thermal stress or excessive starting frequency
Rotor Bar.Recommended_Action: Perform motor current signature analysis (MCSA) and schedule rotor inspection/teardown

Misalignment.Probable_Cause: Motor shaft misaligned with the driven load/coupling
Misalignment.Recommended_Action: Perform laser alignment check and correct the motor mounting position
